business_problem: Alibaba Group's 11.11 (Double 11) shopping festival—now in its 13th year—needed a technology backbone capable of handling extreme traffic peaks (2020 saw orders peak at 583,000 transactions per second, 1,457x the first Double 11 in 2009 and exceeding 2019's 544,000), seamless customer experience, secure transaction gateways, real-time processing, and a path to sustainable green operations.
solution_summary: Double 11 Global Shopping Festival operates 100% cloud-native infrastructure, processing 583,000 peak transactions per second during the world's largest online shopping event. Apsara computational engine orchestrates elastic scaling to handle 1,457x growth from the inaugural 2009 event while Hanguang 800 AI inference chip accelerates product search and recommendation engines. M6 large-scale AI model optimizes apparel design workflows, reducing design cycles from months to weeks. The cloud-native architecture reduced computing resources by 50% per 10,000 transactions, boosted CPU utilization by 30%, and enabled green technologies including liquid cooling and renewable energy reducing carbon emissions by 26,000 tons annually.
business_outcome: The 2021 Double 11 ran fully on cloud-native technologies, reducing computing resources by 50% per 10,000 transactions vs the prior year, boosting computing efficiency / deployment by 20% and CPU utilization by 30%, accelerating search by 200% with 58% lower energy cost, cutting T-shirt manufacturing carbon footprint by 30%+, and saving 26,000 tons of CO2 at the Zhangbei County data center.
metrics: 583,000 transactions per second peak in 2020 (1,457x first Double 11)
50% reduction in computing resources per 10,000 transactions YoY
20% boost in technology deployment, 30% boost in CPU utilization
30%+ reduction in T-shirt manufacturing carbon footprint
26,000+ tons of CO2 emissions reduced (Zhangbei data center)
1M+ packages delivered by Xiaomanlv robot at 200+ campuses
architecture_clues: Apsara super computational engine for elastic scale
Hanguang 800 AI inference chip for search and recommendation
M6 large-scale AI model for AI-intensive operations
Liquid cooling + wind energy in hyperscale data centers
evidence_quotes: The event in 2020 saw orders peaking at 583,000 transactions per second, 1,457 times that of the first Double 11 in 2009, exceeding the highest transactions of 544,000 of 2019.
The full use of cloud-native technologies reduced computing resources by 50% for every 10,000 transactions compared to last year.
The algorithm performance enhanced the search function by 200%, with a 58% reduction in energy costs.

solution_components.name: Elastic Compute Service
solution_components.role: Foundational compute resources handling peak transaction processing and traffic distribution

solution_components.name: Apsara Computational Engine
solution_components.role: Super computational backbone orchestrating elastic scaling for unpredictable traffic surges during Double 11

solution_components.name: Machine Learning Platform for AI
solution_components.role: ML algorithms for recommendation systems, fraud detection, and user profiling

solution_components.name: Hanguang 800 AI Inference Chip
solution_components.role: Specialized AI chip accelerating product search, recommendation, and personalization efficiency

solution_components.name: M6 Large-Scale AI Model
solution_components.role: Foundation model optimizing AI-intensive operations including apparel design and product analytics

data_flow: Customer transactions → Apsara engine for elastic scaling → recommendation/search via Hanguang 800 → order processing → last-mile logistics assignment → fulfillment
integration_points: Logistics partners (Xiaomanlv delivery bots deployed at 200+ campuses)
